name: review-continue
description: Extra review/fix rounds in an existing worktree, used by the IOE v3 outer skill when the main flow blocked at review-gate with unresolved merge_blockers and the user chose 'continue' or 'fix'. Fixes the known blockers first, then verifies up to 3 rounds.

worktree-path.description: Absolute path to the existing worktree

blockers-json.description: JSON array string of the unresolved merge_blockers to fix
